# Contributors | 贡献者

We thank all contributors who have helped build and improve
agentinsight-researcher.

我们感谢所有为 agentinsight-researcher 建设和改进做出贡献的人。

<!-- ALL-CONTRIBUTORS-LIST:START - Do not remove or modify this section automatically generated by all-contributors-bot -->

## Core Team | 核心团队

- **AgentInsight Team** — Project maintainer & architecture design

## How to Contribute | 如何贡献

Please read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for development setup,
coding standards, and PR workflow.

请阅读 [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) 了解开发环境配置、编码规范和 PR 流程。

## Recognition | 贡献者认可

Contributors are recognized in the following ways:

- Listed in the contributors table above (auto-generated by [all-contributors-bot](https://allcontributors.org))
- Mentioned in release notes for significant features
- Invited to join the core team for sustained contributions

贡献者将通过以下方式获得认可：

- 列入上方贡献者表格（由 [all-contributors-bot](https://allcontributors.org) 自动生成）
- 重要功能在发布说明中提及
- 持续贡献者可受邀加入核心团队

## How to Add Yourself | 如何添加自己

Use the [all-contributors](https://allcontributors.org/docs/en/cli/overview) CLI to add contributors:

```bash
# Install all-contributors CLI
npm install -g all-contributors-cli

# Add a contributor (example)
all-contributors add <github-username> code,doc,review

# Generate the table
all-contributors generate
```

Or use the [all-contributors GitHub App](https://github.com/apps/allcontributors) for automatic bot-based updates.

使用 [all-contributors](https://allcontributors.org/docs/en/cli/overview) CLI 添加贡献者：

```bash
# 安装 all-contributors CLI
npm install -g all-contributors-cli

# 添加贡献者 (示例)
all-contributors add <github用户名> code,doc,review

# 生成表格
all-contributors generate
```

也可使用 [all-contributors GitHub App](https://github.com/apps/allcontributors) 通过 Bot 自动更新。
